summary.key_theme: 儘管面臨法律訴訟與監管壓力，Meta 憑藉強勁的 AI 基礎設施投資、產品創新及市場情緒回暖，持續獲得分析師與投資人的長期看好。

bullish.title: Meta Expands AI Glasses And Infrastructure As Capital Commitments Climb
bullish.reason: Meta 擴展 AI 智慧眼鏡產品線並持續投入基礎設施，顯示公司在 AI 變現與硬體生態系布局的積極進展。

bullish.title: Corning and Meta Celebrate Start of Construction on Cable Manufacturing Expansion in North Carolina to Support AI Buildout
bullish.reason: 與 Corning 合作擴建光纖製造設施，直接支持 Meta 的 AI 數據中心建設，強化長期競爭護城河。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer Explains Why He Thought Meta’s “Sell-Off Based on These Lawsuits Was Strange, Wrong, Maybe Even Ridiculous”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開表示市場對訴訟的反應過度，有助於穩定散戶信心。

bullish.title: Meta’s natural gas binge could power South Dakota
bullish.reason: 透過天然氣發電支持 Hyperion AI 數據中心，解決了 AI 運算對能源需求的瓶頸。

bullish.title: Can Meta Platforms Reach a $9 Trillion Valuation in 5 Years? Here's What It Would Take
bullish.reason: 探討高層薪酬激勵機制與長期市值潛力，強化投資人對公司成長動能的信心。

bearish.title: Morgan Stanley Trims PT on Meta Platforms (META) to $775 Amid Softer Advertising Backdrop
bearish.reason: 摩根士丹利下調目標價，反映對廣告市場環境疲軟的擔憂，對短期股價構成壓力。

bearish.title: Meta Has a Safety Problem. It Might Have to Fix It.
bearish.reason: 針對社交媒體設計與行銷的監管風險，可能迫使公司調整營運模式並增加合規成本。

bearish.title: Meta's court losses spell potential trouble for AI research, consumer safety
bearish.reason: 法院判決敗訴可能影響 AI 研究進度及數據隱私政策，增加法律不確定性。

bearish.title: Will 2026 See More Tech Layoffs Than 2025? Here's What Prediction Market Is Saying
bearish.reason: 提及 Meta 因 AI 自動化需求持續裁員，雖有助於利潤率，但反映出勞動力市場的動盪。

neutral.title: Wall Street Analysts Think Meta Platforms (META) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
neutral.reason: 綜合券商建議，提供市場共識觀點，無重大新消息。

neutral.title: Meta Platforms, Inc. (META) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為投資人關注度分析，未提供實質財務影響。

neutral.title: Should You Chase the Rally in Meta Platforms Stock Today?
neutral.reason: 討論股價隨大盤反彈的技術面因素，屬市場情緒觀察。

neutral.title: Microsoft vs Meta: Both AI Stocks Have Been Hit Hard, But One Is a Better Buy Now
neutral.reason: 同業比較分析，提供投資人選擇參考，無直接利多或利空影響。

neutral.title: Assessing Meta Platforms (META) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
neutral.reason: 針對近期股價下跌後的估值評估，屬中性市場評論。
